Heating & cooling | Cooling (air conditioner) | Temperature varies by room
	
In Progress
	
Approved
	
	
$95.00
	
Approved
	
Standard
	
A/C doesn’t seam to work during the day. Temperature is set to 68, during the day the inside temperature goes up to 79 and at night it doesn’t go down all the way. It is hot in every individual room upstairs
	
2026-05-22: The unit is on and working, blowing cold air upstairs and downstairs. Airflow is strong coming out of the vents; even the tenant said it’s the strongest it has been the past week. Someone came out here yesterday from Main Street and did some work. I also Outside unit breaker tripped, and can’t be reset

}

    color: #6CABD1!important;
}

    color: #FFFFFF!important;
}

    color: #414242!important;
}

    color: #6CABD1!important;
}

    color: #6CABD1!important;
}

button.slds-button.slds-button--neutral.uiButton--brand {
    color: #FFFFFF!important;
}

button.slds-button.slds-button--neutral.uiButton--default.uiButton--brand.uiButton.forceActionButton {
    color: #FFFFFF!important;
}

button.slds-button.slds-button--neutral.uiButton--brand.uiButton.forceActionButton {
    color: #FFFFFF!important;
}

button.contactSupportButton:hover {
    color: #FFFFFF!important;
}

    text-decoration: underline;
}

    .siteforceCptBody .cSearchContainer {
        width: 28% !important;

    	max-width: 28% !important;
    }
}

        border-color: #D6D6D6 !important;
        border-width: 1px !important;
}

.salesforceIdentityLoginBody2 .siteforceSldsOneColLayout {

}

}

.cHeaderWrapper .cHeaderTop .cHeaderTopInternalWrapper .cptNavBar

    max-width: none;
}

.slds-item--label.slds-truncate.recordCell {

}

}

}

}

}

.d2l-w2d-collection-fixed {
